data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $212 million yesterday, continuing a net inflow for 8 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 23, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$212 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$431 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$47.985 billion.
The second is VanEck ETF HODL, with a net inflow of US$17.7185 million in a single day, and the total net inflow of HODL in history has reached US$930 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF GBTC, with a net outflow of US$89.1747 million in a single day, and the total net outflow of GBTC in history has reached US$23.079 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$131.392 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 6.11%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.527 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$58.6295 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 6 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 23, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$58.6295 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$52.8429 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.4 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$5.7867 million. Currently, ETH's total net inflow has reached US$661 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.122 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 2.97%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.76 billion.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: Beware of the "Withdrawal Verification Code" scam, victims have lost $1.1 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Chief Information Security Officer @im23pds said that you should pay attention to the 'withdrawal verification code' scam and don't fall into the phishing trap.
Some victims claimed to have received a text message from a trading platform, which read 'Your verification code is 819121, which is used for withdrawal. If you have not applied for this verification code, please call us at 0330 027 1814.'
The victim called back and encountered a professional scam. The other party explained that this was a security breach and he would notify other cryptocurrency verification companies to implement security restrictions. The other party said that they would investigate and call back soon.
A few minutes later, he received a call from the 'Ledger' company, saying that there were some security issues and professionally helped the victim, guiding the victim to visit the phishing website, causing the victim to lose $1.1 million.

data.title: Cathie Wood: The stock market will be the biggest beneficiary of President Trump's policies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood said that in the early days of the Reagan administration, Federal Reserve Chairman Volcker raised the federal funds rate from 10% to 20%, causing the economy to fall into recession from 1983. President Reagan's policies ushered in the best 15 to 20 years in the history of financial markets. Both the stock and bond markets have flourished. We believe that given the current much lower interest rates, the stock market will be the biggest beneficiary of President Trump's policies.

data.title: Stealth Bitcoin Bull Run Ahead: Fidelity Says Do Not Blink
data.description:
Fidelity Digital Assets chose a single post on X to frame its latest research note: “Bitcoin is up ~63 % from its 2024 halving price with 27 % of this halving epoch completed. While past epochs saw triple-digit rallies, a new story may be unfolding: one of rising maturity, deeper adoption, and network resilience. ” The tweet landed minutes after the firm released “2024 Bitcoin Halving: One Year Later,” authored by senior analyst Daniel Gray, who contends that the apparent lull in price action masks “a strengthening foundation. ” Fidelity Flags Bitcoin’s Silent Surge “Bitcoin presents a nuanced narrative a year after its fourth halving, with signs pointing toward consolidation, network resilience, and growing institutional adoption,” Gray writes, adding that structural indicators “suggest a strengthening foundation
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/stealth-bitcoin-bull-run-ahead-fidelity-says-do-not-blink/

data.title: Trump's use of presidential seal at TRUMP dinner may violate federal law
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump flew from the White House to his golf club in Virginia on Thursday night by military helicopter to attend his private TRUMP dinner, but used the official presidential seal on the event invitation and venue decoration, including using a podium decorated with the presidential seal to speak to his TRUMP token investors, which may have violated US federal law.
Under federal law, the national emblem cannot be used in a way that may "convey the wrong impression of government sponsorship or approval", and violators may face fines or up to six months in prison.
Earlier, when asked whether the government would release the guest list, White House Press Secretary Carolyn Levitt said, "The president attended in his personal capacity. This is not a White House dinner, nor is it held at the White House." (Forbes)

data.title: Japan intends to reach tariff agreement with the United States before the June G7 summit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Japanese Economy Minister Ryomasa Akasawa said his goal is to resolve tariff negotiations in time for a meeting between U.S. President Trump and Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba in June. "It has been confirmed that the leaders of both countries are looking forward to their meeting," Akasawa told reporters after meeting with U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick and U.S. Trade Representative Greer in Washington on Friday. "We will keep this in mind and do our best." Before he made the above remarks, Trump and Ishiba had a phone call and promised to meet during the G7 summit next month. A few hours later, Trump said he agreed to a partnership between Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel (X.N). (Jin Shi)

data.title: The New York Times released a preliminary list of Trump dinner attendees
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to statistics from the New York Times reporter on the scene, and confirmed through on-site photos, the people who participated in the TRUMP dinner include: Justin Sun, Washington lawyer Elliot Berke, Wintermute founder and CEO Evgeny Gaevoy, two co-founders of Delphi Digital Anil Lulla and Yan Liberman, Chinese cryptocurrency investor Cheng Lu, CTS International founder Stephen Dworkin, digital asset management agency Hyperithm CEO Sangrok Oh, conservative media person Caitlin Sinclair, former NBA star Lamar Odom, Acheron Trading founder Wesley Pryor, NFT platform Magic Eden co-founder and CEO Jack Tan Lu, two executives of hedge fund Hyper-Alpha Capital Asher Ang and Lean Sheng Tan, Synthetix founder Kain Warwick, Singapore engineer Joel Lee, Kronos Research CEO Vincent Liu, Wexford Capital partner Paul Jacobi, etc.

data.title: Whale Activity: Significant AAVE Purchase Follows WBTC Sale
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Yu Jin has reported notable trading activity involving a large-scale investor or institution. After selling 184.4 WBTC, valued at approximately $20.4 million, through Wintermute OTC yesterday, the entity has now purchased $15 million worth of AAVE through the same platform.

The transaction involved transferring $15 million USDC to Wintermute, resulting in the acquisition of 57,715 AAVE tokens at a price of $259.9 each. Since March 2023, the investor has been accumulating AAVE, spending a total of $30.8 million to amass 224,010 AAVE tokens at an average price of $137.5. This strategy has yielded an unrealized profit of $26.32 million.
